text_original: this app cannot refund your accedental purchase.
text_zh: 此应用无法退还您的意外购买款项。
reply_original: Hi! I'm sorry for the accidental purchase. Since Google manages all payments, we cannot process refunds directly. You can request a refund via Google Play: Open Play Store -> Profile -> Payments & subscriptions -> Budget & history -> Find order -> Request refund. For further help, please email us at support@fantachat.ai.
reply_zh: 你好！对于您的误购，我们深表歉意。由于所有付款均由 Google 管理，我们无法直接为您办理退款。您可以通过 Google Play 申请退款：打开 Play 商店 -> 个人资料 -> 付款和订阅 -> 预算和历史记录 -> 找到订单 -> 申请退款。如需进一步帮助，请发送电子邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。
